title: QA / Tester Path - Coming Soon | Skill-Wanderer
description: QA and Software Testing learning path. Learn testing fundamentals, black box testing, grey box testing, exploratory testing, and quality engineering concepts.
plainText:
QA / Tester Path Ensure Quality at Every Step Master software testing methodologies, critical thinking, and quality assurance best practices. Progress from testing fundamentals to advanced quality engineering concepts that drive product excellence. 🔍 5 Comprehensive Courses 💎 In Development Learning Path Overview A structured journey from testing fundamentals to quality engineering mastery Foundation 2 Courses Testing fundamentals, black box testing, and grey box testing techniques Coming Soon Advanced Testing 2 Courses Exploratory testing, non-functional testing, and product thinking Coming Soon Quality Engineering 1 Course Automation strategy and quality engineering concepts Coming Soon Course 1: Testing Fundamentals & Black Box Testing Build a solid foundation in software testing principles 1 Testing Fundamentals & Black Box Testing Coming Soon * Curriculum subject to change Objective: Learn the core principles of software testing and master black box testing techniques to validate software behavior. What You'll Learn: Software testing fundamentals and terminology Test planning and test case design Black box testing techniques (equivalence partitioning, boundary value analysis) Decision tables and state transition testing Bug reporting and defect lifecycle Test documentation and traceability Course 2: Grey Box Testing Bridge the gap between black box and white box approaches 2 Grey Box Testing Techniques Coming Soon * Curriculum subject to change Objective: Learn to leverage partial system knowledge to design more effective tests that uncover hidden defects. What You'll Learn: Grey box testing concepts and when to apply them Database testing and data validation API testing fundamentals Integration testing strategies Understanding system architecture for better testing Log analysis and debugging techniques Course 3: Exploratory Testing & Advanced Thinking + Non-Functional Testing Develop advanced testing skills and critical thinking 3 Exploratory Testing & Non-Functional Testing Coming Soon * Curriculum subject to change Objective: Master exploratory testing techniques and learn to evaluate software beyond functional requirements. What You'll Learn: Exploratory testing methodology and session-based testing Advanced thinking and heuristics for testers Performance testing fundamentals Security testing basics Usability and accessibility testing Reliability, scalability, and maintainability considerations Course 4: Product & Business Thinking Align testing with business goals and user needs 4 Product & Business Thinking for Testers Coming Soon * Curriculum subject to change Objective: Develop a product mindset to prioritize testing efforts and deliver maximum business value. What You'll Learn: Understanding business requirements and user personas Risk-based testing and prioritization User journey mapping and critical path analysis Metrics that matter: quality indicators and KPIs Communicating quality to stakeholders Balancing quality, speed, and cost tradeoffs Course 5: Automation Strategy & Quality Engineering (Conceptual) Strategic thinking for modern quality assurance 5 Automation Strategy & Quality Engineering Coming Soon * Curriculum subject to change Objective: Learn to think strategically about test automation and quality engineering to build sustainable quality practices. What You'll Learn: Test automation strategy and ROI considerations The test automation pyramid and when to automate Continuous testing and CI/CD integration concepts Quality engineering mindset and shift-left testing Building a quality culture in teams Future trends in quality assurance Our Learning Philosophy 🔍 Think Like a Detective Develop critical thinking skills to uncover hidden defects and ask the right questions about software behavior. 📈 Progressive Complexity Start with testing fundamentals and gradually build up to strategic quality engineering concepts. 💼 Business-Focused Quality Learn to align testing efforts with business goals and communicate value to stakeholders. Be the First to Know Join our community to get notified when the QA/Tester path launches. You'll receive updates on course development and early access opportunities. Get Notified Explore Front-End Development Path
